# Analytical Software Lane

Use for Niners-style formula work, keeper/drop models, margin labs, pricing tools, forecasts, simulations, and decision engines.

Pass example: "Change keeper score weights with formula docs, fixture expectations, unit tests, and before/after output tables."

Fail example: "Improve recommendations with vague AI summaries and no deterministic test values."

Required evidence: unit tests, fixture expectations, formula docs, model audit report, data validation, before/after output table, confidence/missingness rules.

Forbidden by default: untested formula changes, fake confidence, hidden default weights, live/private data without approval, visual polish before correctness.
